projects.title: Living Lab
projects.text: JamboMaisha is a digital learning platform that empowers local farmers with knowledge and skills to improve their agricultural practices. Through interactive modules, farmers can access information on sustainable farming techniques, crop management, and market trends.

projects.title: Maabara ya Maisha
projects.description: Kujifunza kidijitali kwa wakulima wa eneo hilo

projects.title: Mipango ya Maji Safi
projects.description: Kujenga vifaa vya usambazaji katika mikutano.
